overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing Arthur Morgan walking through an abandoned snowy mountain village. The character traverses a cemetery, passes stone ruins, walks along a snowy path between log cabins, and enters a rustic cabin to explore its dimly lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered cemetery with stone church ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy cemetery toward the stone church structure

entered.detail: weathered stone wall of the church building covered in snow
tall wooden tower structure attached to the stone building
snow-covered grave markers scattered throughout the cemetery
bare tree branches heavy with snow in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a snow-covered cemetery with visible tombstones and stone church ruins. The character walks forward through the graveyard as sun rays filter through the trees, approaching a large stone building with a wooden scaffold tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain path with panoramic views

events.description: exits the enclosed cemetery area into open mountain landscape with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy path with mountains visible in the distance

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peaks in the background
rustic wooden fence posts lining the snowy path
tall evergreen trees covered in snow

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the cemetery, the scene opens into a wide snowy landscape with towering mountains in the background. The character walks along a path bordered by wooden fences and snow-covered pine trees under a bright morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned mountain village street with log cabins

events.description: enters the village area with multiple log cabins lining both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the abandoned village street between rows of snow-covered log cabins

entered.detail: rustic log cabins with snow-covered roofs lining the village street
old wooden wagon wheel partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The character enters an abandoned village street lined with rustic log cabins on both sides. Snow blankets the roofs and ground as the character walks down the path between the wooden structures, passing an old wagon wheel.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching a specific log cabin entrance

events.description: opens the cabin door and enters the dark interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the log cabin door and entering the building

entered.detail: wooden cabin door with snow on the frame
small snow-covered porch in front of the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a specific log cabin, walks up to the wooden door, and enters the dark interior, transitioning from the bright snowy exterior to the dimly lit cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic log cabin interior with stone fireplace

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from bright exterior to dark interior with light streaming through windows
character stops walking and looks around the room, panning the camera

agents.ego_description: exploring the cabin interior, examining the stone fireplace and looking through doorways

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with smoke rising from the chimney
rough-hewn log walls of the cabin interior
doorway leading to another room in the cabin
simple wooden chair and small table

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit log cabin, the character explores the rustic interior featuring a stone fireplace, wooden plank walls, and simple furniture. Light streams through small windows as the character surveys the abandoned dwelling, panning to look through doorways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, snow-covered graveyard into the intimate, shadowed interior of a rustic mountain cabin. It begins among weathered tombstones and stone church ruins, moving forward as sun rays filter through the trees toward a large stone building with a wooden scaffold. As the camera emerges from the cemetery, the view expands into a wide snowy landscape of towering mountains and pine trees before narrowing into an abandoned village street lined with snow-blanketed log cabins and old wagon wheels. The scene then shifts from the bright morning light of the outdoors as the character approaches a wooden door and steps inside a dark dwelling. Finally, the perspective settles within the dimly lit interior, panning across wooden plank walls and a stone fireplace where thin streams of light pierce through small windows.
